signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rose to 2.2% YoY (from 2.0% in February), undershooting market forecasts of 2.3-2.4% due to government measures curbing oil-driven price hikes | NO | HIGH confidence**[1][2][3]

This data, released Thursday by South Korea's Ministry of Data and Statistics, confirms contained price pressures despite global oil volatility from the Iran conflict, with monthly
